Arka Solar Energy | Best Solar Panel Installation in Chennai

Solar Panel Installation in Chennai

Arka Solar Energy provides the best solar panel installation in Chennai for homes, apartments, and commercial industries. Our expert team handles everything from site survey and design to engineering, installation, and maintenance. As a leading solar EPC company in Chennai, we specialize in high-performance rooftop solar power plants that provide long-term energy savings and environmental benefits.

Choosing the right solar partner is crucial for a successful transition to renewable energy. At Arka Solar Energy, we use premium Tier-1 solar modules and high-efficiency inverters to ensure maximum energy generation. Our installations are designed to withstand Chennai's specific climate conditions, including coastal humidity and high temperatures.

Benefits of Solar Energy

Switching to solar energy in Chennai offers numerous advantages:

  • Reduce Electricity Bills: Eliminate up to 90% of your monthly EB bills through efficient rooftop solar systems.
  • Government Subsidy Support: Take advantage of the PM Surya Ghar Muft Bijli Yojana and get up to ₹78,000 in subsidies.
  • Eco-Friendly Investment: Reduce your carbon footprint and contribute to a cleaner, greener Chennai.
  • Increase Property Value: Buildings with solar installations have higher market value and better energy efficiency ratings.
  • Low Maintenance: Solar panels have no moving parts and require minimal upkeep, primarily regular cleaning.

Residential Solar Installation

We provide custom solar rooftop solutions for single-family homes and villas across Chennai. Our residential installations focus on maximizing self-consumption and leveraging the latest government subsidies. With a 3kW system, most households can eliminate their electricity bills entirely.

Our team assists with the entire PM Surya Ghar subsidy application process, ensuring you receive the financial aid you are entitled to without any hassle. We also handle TANGEDCO net-metering approvals to credit your surplus solar energy back to the grid.

Commercial & Industrial Solar Solutions

For businesses and industries in Chennai, solar power is a strategic investment. We design and install large-scale solar power plants for factories, hospitals, schools, and apartment complexes. These systems offer significant tax benefits, including accelerated depreciation, and provide a fixed energy cost for over 25 years.

Our engineering team performs detailed load analysis and shading studies to ensure optimal system performance for commercial rooftops. We use robust mounting structures and advanced monitoring systems to track energy generation in real-time.

PM Surya Ghar: Muft Bijli Yojana

The Government of India's latest scheme, the PM Surya Ghar Yojana, makes solar more affordable than ever. Homeowners can receive significant subsidies directly into their bank accounts based on the installed capacity:

  • 1 kW System: ₹30,000 Subsidy
  • 2 kW System: ₹60,000 Subsidy
  • 3 kW and above: ₹78,000 Subsidy

As authorized solar vendors, we guide you through the registration on the Official PM Surya Ghar Portal and ensure seamless commissioning.

Why Choose Arka Solar Energy?

Arka Solar Energy stands out as the trusted solar company in Chennai due to our commitment to quality and customer service. We offer end-to-end EPC (Engineering, Procurement, and Construction) services, meaning we handle the entire project lifecycle.

Our relationships with top-tier equipment manufacturers allow us to provide the best technology at competitive prices. We ensure that every installation meets international safety standards and local DISCOM (TANGEDCO) regulations.

Authority Links & Resources

For more information on solar policies and grid connectivity in Tamil Nadu, visit these official sites:

  • Ministry of New and Renewable Energy (MNRE)
  • TANGEDCO - Tamil Nadu Generation and Distribution Corporation
  • PM Surya Ghar Official Portal
